pages.text: $(l)Magic circles$() are the oldest form of Transcendence manipulation. The ancients discovered that geometric patterns could $(l)resonate$() with elemental threads, creating stable fields of power.$(br2)Each circle binds a specific element to a physical area. The $(l)sixteen known patterns$() range from the defensive Arcane Formation to the devastating Void Formation.

The $(l)enhancement system$() was developed by later scholars who found that layering additional materials could amplify a circle's power, duration, and efficiency.$(br2)The $(l)Mana Crystal$() — crystallized Transcendence energy — serves as fuel. The more powerful the circle, the more crystals it demands.
